# 放飛設計 Form Factory

> Form Factory (放飛設計) is an independent 3D animation and VFX studio based in Taipei, Taiwan. Founded by architect-turned-animator Roger Tung (童自全), a UCL Bartlett School of Architecture graduate (2017) and former collaborator at Shigeru Ban Architects in Tokyo. The studio specialises in product animation for technology and luxury brands, music video VFX, and brand commercials. Clients include ASUS, ROG, AORUS, Gigabyte, Binance, OKX, Kavalan, Tatung, SYM, and the National Palace Museum. Core tools: Houdini, Blender, Cinema 4D, Rhino, After Effects.

---

## Home

**URL:** https://www.formfactory.studio/

Form Factory is an independent 3D animation and VFX studio based in Taipei. Work spans product animation, music video VFX, brand commercials, and cultural projects — for technology brands, record labels, agencies, and museums.

**Clients featured:** AORUS, ASUS, Binance, Futsu Construction, Gigabyte, Kavalan, OKX, Poly Auction, ROG, Shaomei, Startup Island Taiwan, Sodick, SYM, Tatung

---

## About

**URL:** https://www.formfactory.studio/about

Form Factory (放飛設計) is an independent 3D animation and VFX studio based in Taipei, founded by 童自全 Roger Tung — an architect turned animator.

Roger studied architecture at The Bartlett School of Architecture, University College London, graduating in 2017. One of the world's most demanding and unconventional design programs, The Bartlett shaped the way he approaches every project: through spatial thinking, visual storytelling, and the conviction that form is never separate from meaning. Before founding Form Factory, he worked at the office of Pritzker Prize-winning architect Shigeru Ban in Tokyo, where he contributed to the roof tessellation design of the Tainan Art Museum.

That foundation — architectural rigour, spatial awareness, narrative instinct — is what Form Factory brings to 3D animation and VFX.

Most studios approach this work technically. Form Factory approaches it as visual storytelling with a rendering engine. Clients usually know what they want to say; the studio's job is to figure out how to make people feel it.

Form Factory specialises in product animation for technology and luxury brands, music video VFX, and brand commercials. The studio works across Houdini, Blender, Cinema 4D, Rhino, and After Effects — and has produced work for clients including ASUS, ROG, AORUS, Gigabyte, Binance, OKX, Kavalan, Tatung, SYM, and the National Palace Museum.

---

## Contact

**URL:** https://www.formfactory.studio/contact

Form Factory is based in Taipei, Taiwan. New project enquiries can be submitted via the contact form on the website. The studio works with technology brands, luxury brands, record labels, advertising agencies, and cultural institutions both locally and internationally.

---

## Works

**URL:** https://www.formfactory.studio/works

27 projects total. Filterable by discipline (VFX, 3D Animation, Compositing, Digital Intermediate, 2D Animation) and category (Music Video, Product Animation, Launch Event, Commercial, Branding).

---

## Project Pages

### ASUS CES 2025 Opening Animation
**URL:** https://www.formfactory.studio/works/asus-ces-2025-ceo-animation
**Client:** ASUS 華碩
**Date:** October 2024
**Discipline:** VFX, 3D Animation
**Category:** Launch Event

3D animation and visual effects created for the ASUS CEO keynote opening sequence at CES 2025 — one of the world's largest consumer electronics trade shows. Produced in late 2024 for the January 2025 Las Vegas event.

---

### ROG Boundless 2022 Launch Event
**URL:** https://www.formfactory.studio/works/rog-boundless-2022-launch-event
**Client:** ASUS ROG
**Discipline:** VFX, 3D Animation
**Category:** Launch Event

Visual effects and 3D animation produced for ASUS ROG's "Boundless" 2022 product launch event. ROG (Republic of Gamers) is ASUS's premium gaming hardware brand.

---
